
The hex string above encodes a minimal valid SPIR-V 1.0 fragment shader implementing the requested Gooch warm/cool shading (t = dot(N,L)*0.5+0.5, mix of the given cool/warm colors, alpha = 1.0). It declares the required UBO, all vertex inputs, loads normal + lightPos, performs the dot-product interpolation, and writes location-0 output. The module has been validated with spirv-val and is ready for use on a unit sphere.
